summary: Iteration 5 - All tests passed. Verified: 1) Delete buttons work without window.confirm/Alert.alert across all screens, 2) Skincare endpoint accepts skin_type AND season params, 3) LANGUAGES array has exactly 12 languages (no nl/tr/hi/zh/ja/ko), 4) Inline skincare section replaces 'Insight AI' card on work screen with skin type + season selectors

issues: Minor: 'shadow*' style props deprecated warnings in console - should use 'boxShadow'

critical_code_review_comments: All delete functions verified - no window.confirm or Alert.alert blocking delete operations
Skincare section is INLINE on work screen (not behind modal), replaces old 'Insight AI' card
LANGUAGES array has exactly 12 supported languages with translation files

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all code structure and UI tests passed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 verified all user-reported issues are fixed: 1) Delete buttons work across entire app (no window.confirm/Alert.alert blocking), 2) LANGUAGES array reduced to 12 supported languages with translation files, 3) Skincare section is inline on calendar/work screen with skin type + season selectors and data-testids
